Purpose: Define spending categories, approval paths, and placeholder thresholds.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Congregation if vote required. Handbook: Yes. Open questions: What dollar thresholds and church vote triggers apply?. File name: docs/policies/financial-authority-policy-package.md. Type of document: Policy review package. Purpose: Coordinate spending, reimbursement, payment-card, exception, and congregational approval decisions.. Current status: Needs Finance Review. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Treasurer, Congregation if required. Handbook: No. Open questions: Which thresholds and approval paths should Finance recommend?. File name: docs/policies/reimbursement-policy.md. Type of document: Policy. Purpose: Define reimbursement documentation, routine expense treatment, pre-approval needs, and review process.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee. Handbook: Yes. Open questions: Who approves routine reimbursements, and what submission deadline applies?. File name: docs/policies/credit-card-policy.md. Type of document: Policy. Purpose: Define controlled payment/card use, cardholder responsibilities, receipt rules, monthly review, and revocation.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee. Handbook: Yes. Open questions: What card/payment method should KBC use and who may hold cards?. File name: docs/policies/offering-counting-and-deposit-policy.md. Type of document: Policy. Purpose: Define controls for counting, recording, and depositing offerings.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Treasurer, Bookkeeper. Handbook: Yes. Open questions: What current counting process is used and what controls are required?. File name: docs/policies/monthly-financial-review-policy.md. Type of document: Policy. Purpose: Define monthly review items for reports, reconciliations, budget status, and exceptions.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Treasurer. Handbook: Yes. Open questions: What exact monthly packet should be required?. File name: docs/policies/audit-and-review-policy.md. Type of document: Policy. Purpose: Define periodic audit, review, or external accounting expectations.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Congregation if vote required. Handbook: Yes. Open questions: What level of review is appropriate for KBC and who performs it?. File name: docs/procedures/weekly-bookkeeping-checklist.md. Type of document: Procedure / checklist. Purpose: Provide repeatable weekly bookkeeping steps.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Bookkeeper, Treasurer, Finance Committee. Handbook: Yes. Open questions: What exact weekly tasks are performed today?. File name: docs/procedures/monthly-close-checklist.md. Type of document: Procedure / checklist. Purpose: Provide repeatable month-end close steps and report preparation.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Bookkeeper, Treasurer, Finance Committee. Handbook: Yes. Open questions: What system reports and reconciliations are required each month?. File name: docs/procedures/monthly-finance-committee-meeting-checklist.md. Type of document: Procedure / checklist. Purpose: Provide recurring monthly Finance Committee meeting checklist for income/expenses, budget, designated funds, cards, reimbursements, exceptions, votes, and business meeting reporting.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Treasurer, Bookkeeper. Handbook: Yes. Open questions: Who prepares the packet, records decisions, and maintains the checklist?. File name: docs/procedures/payroll-process.md. Type of document: Procedure. Purpose: Document payroll inputs, approval flow, provider/software steps, and records.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Personnel Committee, Finance Committee, Treasurer, Bookkeeper. Handbook: Yes. Open questions: Who owns payroll changes, approvals, and professional review?. File name: docs/procedures/contribution-entry-process.md. Type of document: Procedure. Purpose: Document contribution entry, total matching, discrepancies, confidentiality, and reporting.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Treasurer, Bookkeeper. Handbook: Yes. Open questions: Who enters contributions today, and how is donor confidentiality protected?.
